approvalSource: Steve directed direct-builder recovery after the Planck hidden-worker confusion and stale served-code fanout failures, with priority on build-lane reliability before continuing the next Foundation-up card.
scopeSummary: Repair process:fanout-check so stale served dashboard code remains a failing root cause but dependent Recent Builds checks are skipped and not recorded as separate telemetry failures until served code matches HEAD.
constraints: Do not launch parallel builders during this card.
Do not weaken, skip, bypass, or demote the stale served-code failure itself.
